creator: boris@tagnet.ru
text:
I have NetMos NM9835 card. When I compile kernel with device puc, I have no
problem to get card working. But when puc is loaded as module (puc_load="YES"
in /boot/loader.conf) it fails to install sio ports. /var/log/messages attached,
puc module is compiled with PUC_DEBUG=1

Fix: Not known for me.
	
How-To-Repeat: Remove device puc from kernel, recompile and install it. Load puc as module.
